title: Sonicraft: Lively Zones
description: An addon for Sonicraft that adds various generation features to its biomes.
body:
_Sonicraft: Lively Zones_ is an addon that adds generation features to biomes from Sonicraft.
These can include:
- Small features like spikes, rings, etc.
- Loops
- Platforming areas based on those in the original games
- Trees and mountains
- Dungeons

These are added to make the biomes more interesting and varied, since I grew bored of Sonicraft due to many of them feeling like glorified plains (this was made pre-evolution update). Additionally, badniks are sped up and unused bosses are implemented.

Completion

```
✔️ = Filled with content
🚧 = Has some special content, but not considered finished
❌ = Either nothing or only the bare minimum (small features, loops and vegetation)
```

- Green Hill Zone ✔️
- Marble Zone ✔️
- Spring Yard Zone ✔️
- Labyrinth Zone ❌
- Star Light Zone ❌
- Scrap Brain Zone ❌
- Emerald Hill Zone ❌
- Chemical Plant Zone ❌
- Aquatic Ruin Zone ❌
- Casino Night Zone ❌
- Studiopolis Zone ❌

- Angel Island Zone ❌
- Scorched Angel Island Zone ❌
